title: What is in the backpack
wikitext:
[]: What is in the backpack?             Quote Post by Lurking2018 » Fri Sep 28, 2018 6:28 pm All the plugsuits have a triangle shaped box on the back. What do you think it has in it or what does it do? Some thoughts are survival supplies or the equipment needed to run the suit such as sensors.

[]: Re: What is in the backpack?             Quote Post by Joseki » Sat Sep 29, 2018 5:43 am Control eletronics is my guess, and probably an antenna for a two-way telemetry of some sort.

[]: Re: What is in the backpack?             Quote Post by silvermoonlight » Sat Sep 29, 2018 5:47 am I always thought it was more like the control centre which sends information back regarding the piolts body read outs to Magi system.

[]: Re: What is in the backpack?             Quote Post by cyharding » Sat Sep 29, 2018 11:06 pm ^ That, and probably the power system for a defibulator as well.

[]: Re: What is in the backpack?             Quote Post by Joseki » Mon Oct 01, 2018 11:26 am It would be interesting to know how long can the plugsuit operate before shutting down. Maybe they mention it in 3.0+1.0.

[]: Re: What is in the backpack?             Quote Post by silvermoonlight » Mon Oct 01, 2018 11:39 am cyharding wrote: ^ That, and probably the power system for a defibulator as well.

[]: Re: What is in the backpack?             Quote Post by AdamMalkovitch » Mon Oct 01, 2018 1:18 pm Yeah, it's gotta be the power for the electronics for the suit. All the monitoring and the watch and the defibrillator and shit like that. Although, I wouldn't be surprised if Mari's were gutted and packed with random shit (e.g. juice boxes).

[]: Re: What is in the backpack?             Quote Post by ShonHam » Tue Oct 02, 2018 7:38 am I imagine it's the core that manages all of the electronics within the suit, at least that makes the most sense to me.

[]: Re: What is in the backpack?             Quote Post by Blockio » Tue Oct 02, 2018 10:21 am Another thing that has to be in there: The gas tanks for the D-Type Plugsuit

[]: Re: What is in the backpack?             Quote Post by DarkBluePhoenix » Sun Oct 21, 2018 11:46 am The "backpack" is probably a large combination of things. The life support and power systems for the suit, the telemetry transmitters/receivers which also probably links up with the A10 connectors, the vacuum pumps to shrink the suit to form fit the pilots, the defibrillator, and it probably also has a locator beacon for SAR operations if the pilot ejects, like when the pilots eject and move away from their Entry Plugs. Don't think much else could fit in there.

[]: Re: What is in the backpack?             Quote Post by Shamsiel-kun » Wed Oct 24, 2018 9:18 am The really important question is: What is in PenPen's backpack? And why does it look somewhat remotely like the back of an Eva?

[]: Re: What is in the backpack?             Quote Post by DarkBluePhoenix » Wed Oct 24, 2018 9:25 am ^ It's either a cooling pack so he doesn't overheat or its full of beef jeered, or both

[]: Re: What is in the backpack?             Quote Post by ChaddyManPrime » Wed Oct 24, 2018 9:53 pm Personally I think it is what causes the vacuum seal like function.

[]: Re: What is in the backpack?             Quote Post by DarkBluePhoenix » Sat Oct 27, 2018 4:17 pm Originally I thought it was a parachute.
